creator: dbabler@Rigel.orionsys.com
text:
The Makefile in /usr/src/gnu/lib/libreadline refers to non-existant files.

How-To-Repeat: 
CVsup RELENG_2_2_2_RELEASE and executed 'make world'. Operations
fails on:

	cd /usr/src/gnu/lib/libreadline && make beforeintall
	install -C -o bin -g bin -m 444 /usr/src/gnu/lib/libreadline/ \
	  ../../../contrib/libreadline/readline.h /usr/include/readline
	install: /usr/src/gnu/libreadline/../../../contrib/libreadline/ \
	  readline.h:
	No such file or directory
	** Error code 71
